chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No.S-173 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution. 13.08.2024 Mr. Moula Bux Rahoo, advocate a/w petitioners. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, A.P.G a/w SIP Muhammad Shafiq of PS Mangli. = O R D E R Adnan-ul-Karim Memon, J. Through the instant petition, the petitioners have prayed for directions like mandamus directing the official as well as private respondents not to interfere in their peaceful matrimonial life. The petitioners claim to be adults and married to each other of their free will, and for that, they are being threatened and harassed by the police at the behest of private respondents. 2. Petitioner No.1 is present in court and states that her statement was recorded vide order dated 30.07.2024. Learned Additional. A.G.P along with police officials, has categorically stated that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioners in any manner of whatsoever nature and the police officials shall act strictly under the law. 3. Petitioners, simply seek protection against the police officials, who are allegedly extending serious threats of life to the petitioners; and learned APG has candidly agreed that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioners; because of such statement, the petitioners are being treated as aggrieved persons within the ambit of Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan. Primarily, this is a free and democratic country, and once a person becomes a major he or she can marry whosoever he/she likes; if the parents of the boy or girl do not approve such inter-caste or inter-religious marriage the maximum they can do is they can cut off social relations with the son or the daughter, but they cannot give threats or commit or instigate for acts of violence and cannot harass the person who undergoes such inter-caste or inter-religious

Petitioners, simply seek protection against the police officials, who are allegedly extending serious threats of life to the petitioners; and learned APG has candidly agreed that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioners; because of such statement, the petitioners are being treated as aggrieved persons within the ambit of Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan. Primarily, this is a free and democratic country, and once a person becomes a major he or she can marry whosoever he/she likes; if the parents of the boy or girl do not approve such inter-caste or inter-religious marriage the maximum they can do is they can cut off social relations with the son or the daughter, but they cannot give threats or commit or instigate for acts of violence and cannot harass the person who undergoes such inter-caste or inter-religious 2 marriage. I, therefore, direct that the administration / police authorities will see, if any boy or girl who being major undergoes inter-caste or inter-religious marriage with a woman or man who is a major, the couple is neither harassed by anyone nor subjected to threats or acts of violence and anyone who gives such threats or harasses or commits acts of violence either himself or at his instigation, is taken to task by instituting criminal proceedings by the police against such persons and further stern action is taken against such person(s) as provided by law. However, the above observation is without prejudice to the legal rights of the parties, if any, pending before the competent court of law. 4. In view of the above, by consent of learned A.P.G., the captioned petition is disposed of with the direction that the petitioners are at liberty to live together and no person including the private respondents shall be permitted to interfere in their peaceful living, subject to all just exceptions as provided under the law. In case any disturbance is caused in the peaceful living of the petitioners, the petitioners shall approach the concerned Senior Superintendent of Police or Superintendent of Police with a copy of this order, who shall provide immediate protection to the petitioners. JUDGE *Faisal*
